subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Hearken unto My call in truth, and be not of them that doubt. Bear thou witness within thine own self that there is no God but [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا رضا اسمع ندائی بالحق و لاتکن من الممترین ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @call to action, @predictions and prophecies
